name: mktero
description: Display opened Zotero PDFs as Markdown

scripts.check: node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check src/bootstrap.js && node --check src/config/mineru-preferences.js && node --check src/mineru/binary.js && node --check src/mineru/mineru-client.js && node --check src/mineru/zip-markdown.js && node --check src/markdown/structured-renderer.js && node --check src/markdown/markdown-html.js && node --check src/core/markdown-document-service.js && node --check src/extractors/mineru-extractor.js && node --check src/extractors/zotero-extractor.js && node --check src/ui/reader-toolbar.js && node --check src/ui/markdown-tab-presenter.js && node --check src/ui/markdown-window.js
